ai_summary: Solex Energy Limited hosted Ghana's High Commissioner to propose a strategic partnership aimed at establishing an end-to-end solar manufacturing ecosystem in Ghana, encompassing technology transfer and skill development. This initiative aligns with Solex's Vision 2030 for significant global manufacturing capacity expansion, positioning the company to penetrate high-growth renewable energy markets in Africa. However, this press release details preliminary discussions and proposals, with no concrete agreements or financial commitments disclosed, indicating the early stage of potential collaboration.
